content.text:
I ran the tests and hit an error. Let me fix it.

#lesson
tool: Bash
trigger: pytest tests/
mistake: Running bare pytest without --no-header causes a hang in non-interactive terminals due to TTY detection
fix: Always append -p no:faulthandler --no-header to pytest commands
tags: lang:python, tool:pytest, severity:hang
#/lesson

Fixed by adding the required flags.
